---
name: kai-taste
description: "Audit or design generative AI interfaces against three diagnostic pillars."
---

# Design Taste: Engineering Framework

## The Three Pillars

| Pillar | What It Measures |
|--------|-----------------|
| Deterministic-Stochastic Balance | Where entropy is injected |
| Interaction Density | Affordances per cognitive load unit |
| Visual Cohesion | Perceptual grammar consistency |

## Failure Modes

| Failure Mode | Detection Signal |
|-------------|-----------------|
| Affordance Collapse | Users miss actions |
